title: Jet Ski Rental in Fort Lauderdale: 2026 Costs, Routes and Tips
html:
Jet ski rental in Fort Lauderdale offers a thrilling way to explore the Intracoastal Waterway and the Atlantic. Depart from Bahia Mar Yachting Center or Pier 66 for a half-day solo ride from USD 250, or join a guided tour from USD 120 per person. Prices vary by season, and BoatHire24 connects renters with verified local operators for a seamless experience.

Where to set off in Fort Lauderdale

Fort Lauderdale has several launch points ideal for jet ski exploration. Launch from Hugh Taylor Birch State Park for immediate Intracoastal access, or head to the Dania Beach Boat Launch for a quick route to the ocean. Popular marinas include Bahia Mar Yachting Center and Pier 66 Marina, both offering jet ski rentals and fuel docks. For a scenic ride, explore the waters around Port Everglades and the mangroves of New River. Nearby towns like Hollywood and Pompano Beach extend your range along the coastline. You can skippered charters in Fort Lauderdale for your chosen dates.

How much does it cost to rent a jet ski in Fort Lauderdale?

Prices for jet ski rental in Fort Lauderdale typically range from USD 120 to USD 400 per hour or half-day. The exact cost depends on the model, duration, and season. For example, a single Seadoo GTI rental for one hour costs around USD 120, while a half-day rate (4 hours) averages USD 300. If you prefer a guided tour with a group, expect to pay from USD 150 per person for a 2-hour excursion. These prices are for 2026 and are subject to fuel surcharges. For those looking to combine jet skiing with other activities, compare skippered charters in Fort Lauderdale on BoatHire24 for broader on-water options.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right jet ski or boat depends on your group size and desired experience. Here are common options available through local operators and the BoatHire24 platform: One option worth a look is the Maiora 26m charter page.

  1. Single Jet Ski (Seadoo GTI or similar), Best for solo riders or couples; 1, 2 guests; from USD 120 per hour.
  2. Double Jet Ski (Yamaha VX Cruiser), Ideal for pairs sharing a ride; 2 guests; from USD 150 per hour.
  3. Small Motorboat (19ft Bowrider), Better for a family of up to 6 who want both speed and comfort; from USD 300 for a half-day.
  4. Luxury Tender (Axopar 28), A stylish choice for groups up to 8 exploring the waterway; from USD 500 for a half-day.
  5. Maiora 26m Yacht, For full-day luxury with a captain; up to 12 guests; book via the Maiora 26m charter page for a crewed experience.

Cost breakdown: Jet ski and boat rental prices in Fort Lauderdale

Understand the typical price bands for rental options in Fort Lauderdale. Below is a summary of common expenses:

  • Shared guided jet ski tour: from USD 80 per person for 1 hour.
  • Small motorboat (half-day, 4 hours): approximately USD 300, 500.
  • Catamaran full-day charter (up to 12 guests): from USD 1,500.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (8-hour day, with skipper and crew): from USD 3,000.

Do you need a licence to rent a jet ski in Fort Lauderdale?

No, you do not need a boating licence, but you must be at least 18 and complete a safety briefing. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

Tip: In summer (June to August) the Atlantic is calmest in the morning before the sea breeze and afternoon thunderstorms. The Intracoastal Waterway offers calm, protected waters year-round for beginners.

Rental operators provide a quick orientation covering local boating rules and no-wake zones. Always check with the operator about age and experience requirements, as policies can vary. In 2026, the same rules apply for jet ski rental in Fort Lauderdale.

At a glance

  • Price band: USD 80, 3,000+ depending on type and duration
  • Peak months: November to April (dry season, mild weather)
  • Trip length: 1 hour to full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: 1, 12 guests
  • Currency: USD

Questions about boat rental in Fort Lauderdale

Can I rent a boat in Fort Lauderdale without a boating licence?

Yes, many rental companies offer boats and jet skis without requiring a licence, as long as you are 18 or older and complete a safety briefing.

What is the best time of year for jet skiing in Fort Lauderdale?

The best time is November to April, when the weather is dry and temperatures range from 20, 27°C, and the Atlantic is generally calm.

How far is it from Fort Lauderdale to the Bahamas by jet ski?

The distance to the nearest Bahamian island, Bimini, is approximately 50 nautical miles, but crossing the Gulf Stream requires skill and caution; guided tours often use larger boats.

Are there any age restrictions for renting a jet ski?

Renters must be at least 18 years old; passengers can be younger, but operators may have minimum age limits, so confirm directly with the provider.

Whether you choose a solo jet ski tour along the Intracoastal or a full-day crewed yacht charter, Fort Lauderdale offers diverse on-water experiences. Book your adventure through the BoatHire24 marketplace, where you can compare verified rentals or list your own boat to reach a worldwide audience.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fort Lauderdale and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
